description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named coverage-tests that runs on pull requests, pushes, and daily on a schedule. The workflow should have read permissions to repository contents and use a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. It should set up a CODECOV_TOKEN environment variable. The workflow should have three jobs: cpp-python-coverage on ubuntu-latest, win-python-coverage on windows-latest, and macos-python-coverage on macos-latest. Each job checks out the repository with submodules, provisions a micromamba environment, displays the environment info, and runs tests with test coverage computation using a specific script for each operating system.
